data.name: DietologistInvitationReceived_Body
data.value: {0} invited you to become their dietologist. Open the invitation to accept or decline.

data.name: DietologistInvitationAccepted_Body
data.value: {0} accepted your invitation and can now see the data you shared.

data.name: DietologistInvitationDeclined_Body
data.value: {0} declined your invitation. You can send a new invitation at any time.

data.name: FastingCompleted_Body
data.value: Time to log how you feel and plan your next meal.

data.name: EatingWindowStarted_Body
data.value: You can eat now. Plan your next meal while the window is open.

data.name: FastingWindowStarted_Body
data.value: Your eating window is over. The next fasting phase is now active.

data.name: FastingCheckInReminder_Body
data.value: Log a quick fasting check-in to track hunger, energy, mood, and symptoms.

data.name: WeeklyCheckIn_Body
data.value: Open your weekly review to see trends and suggestions.

data.name: Hydration_Body
data.value: You are behind your water goal for today.

data.name: GoalReached_Body
data.value: Nice work. You have already hit your protein target today.

data.name: Lesson_Body
data.value: A new nutrition lesson was added to the academy.

data.name: MealPlan_Body
data.value: We found a meal plan that matches your current calorie target.

data.name: Achievement_Body
data.value: You kept your streak going. Check your new badge.
